items.description: Role metadata derived from cookbook metadata.rb

items.notes: Restart redis, restart memcached, reload systemd daemon

items.description: Main entry-point recipe: installs memcached and redis packages, manages users/groups/directories, deploys systemd units, enables and starts services, removes legacy config files
items.notes: Orchestrates validate_credentials → memcached → redis task files

items.description: Cache cookbook default attributes → Ansible role defaults (memcached and redis config vars, vault_redis_password)
items.notes: All Chef node attributes mapped to Ansible defaults; OS-family package lists included

items.description: Memcached tasks: install package, remove legacy config files, deploy systemd unit, enable and start service
items.notes: Package install (Debian/RedHat), systemd unit deploy, service enable

items.description: Redis tasks: install package, create redis user/group, create directories (/etc/redis, /var/lib/redis, /var/log/redis, /var/run/redis/6379), deploy config and systemd unit, enable and start service
items.notes: Package install, log dir, config template, lineinfile strip of deprecated directives (ruby_block migration), service enable

items.description: Redis configuration template — clean version without stripped directives (replica-serve-stale-data, replica-read-only, repl-ping-replica-period, client-output-buffer-limit, replica-priority); uses vault_redis_password for requirepass
items.notes: Migrated all Redis config directives; redis_password injected via AAP credential type

items.description: Memcached custom systemd unit template — replaces OS default service; includes platform-conditional security flags and instance parameters (memory, connections, port, ulimit)
items.notes: Systemd unit with hardened security options; all params templated via defaults

items.description: Verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths for memcached.service, /etc/redis/6379.conf, tmpfiles config, directory ownership/permissions, absence of legacy config files, and absence of stripped Redis directives
items.notes: Translates all pre-flight checks: stat+assert for memcached.service unit, Redis 6379.conf, tmpfiles.d config, and all directories; slurp+assert for config content correctness; assert deprecated directives absent (ruby_block migration); absence checks for /etc/memcached.conf, /etc/sysconfig/memcached, /etc/default/memcached. Service/port checks tagged molecule-notest.

items.description: No-op instance create for delegated driver
Converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (memcached.service unit, redis config, directories)
items.notes: Creates /tmp/molecule_test/ directories and files mirroring role outputs: memcached.service unit, Redis 6379.conf (with deprecated directives stripped via lineinfile), tmpfiles.d config, and all required directories (etc/redis, var/lib/redis, var/log/redis, var/run/redis/6379). Stub redis_password variable provided for credential validation bypass.

items.description: Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection
No-op instance destroy for delegated driver
